Profile.Name: ThemeUI
Profile.Author: onyxdigital-dev
Profile.Overview: ThemeUI is a theme switcher plugin for Unraid 7.2+. It lets you apply beautiful dark color themes - Catppuccin Mocha, Nord, Dracula, Gruvbox Dark, Tokyo Night, Solarized Dark, One Dark, Rosé Pine, Everforest, and Black & White - across the entire Unraid web UI including the dashboard, login page, Docker and VM pages, usage bars, pie charts, tables, buttons, and dropdowns. Themes are applied instantly on save with no reboot required.
Profile.Description: Theme switcher for Unraid 7.2+ with 10 built-in dark themes and a custom CSS override textarea for fine-tuning. Themes cover the full UI: dashboard, login page, tables, pie charts, buttons, and context menus.
